jobs.description: <p><strong>Position Overview:</strong> Bridge Building S.A. (BBSA) is building a Luxembourg regulated EMI and CASP. We are seeking a Data and Regulatory Reporting professional to build and operate BBSA’s regulatory reporting production line, including robust data sourcing, reconciliation, data quality controls, and submission governance. jobs.title: Enterprise Risk Management Specialist, Luxembourg
jobs.description: <p><strong>Position Overview:</strong> Bridge Building S.A. (BBSA) is building a Luxembourg regulated EMI and CASP. We are seeking an Enterprise Risk Management (ERM) Specialist to build and operate BBSA’s enterprise risk framework across financial and non-financial risks, ensuring clear governance, effective risk assessments, and inspection-ready documentation. jobs.title: Internal Auditor, Luxembourg
jobs.description:
<p><strong>Position Overview:</strong> Bridge Building S.A. (BBSA) is building a Luxembourg-regulated EMI and CASP. We are seeking an Internal Auditor manager to establish and execute a risk-based internal audit approach across core regulated-entity domains, including governance, safeguarding, treasury, AML/CTF, ICT/DORA, and outsourcing. The role will be reporting to the Internal Audit Officer based based in Ireland.&nbsp;</p>
